productDisplayName: Nike Men Training Navy Blue T-shirt
description: CompositionNavy blue T-shirt for men made of 100% polyester, has a scalloped neckline, short raglan sleeves, a red mesh panel on the right sleeve and a white mesh panel on the left sleeve, an asymmetric panel on the left hem in red, mesh panels on the sides and back, graphic print on the front with branding appliquéd on the front and printed at the backFitRegularWash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry lowCool iron; do not iron on decorationsDesigned for training needs, this nike T-shirt is made of polyester fabric with Dri-Fit technology to offer absolute sweat-free, fresh comfort. Such properties make it ideal not just for training, but playing any sport even on a hot day. Team this with performance shorts and sports shoes, or tracks and floaters for unparalleled cool.
